title: draba viridis
intro: Draba viridis, also known as the green whitlow grass or green draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and even helping to prevent cancer. Herbal preparations of Draba viridis can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water or by using them in teas and tinctures.
